steps.title: Find the critics' stated concern
steps.content: The key signal is the critics' statement that “it's too early to tell if they can thrive in this unusual setting.” This is the explicit reason for their skepticism.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D directly matches—it identifies that whether the structure can support the plant life is unclear.

The other three address design adaptation to different locations, plant diversity compared to original plans, and construction damage—none of which the passage cites as reasons for skepticism.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
